message:
perf(raptorq): eliminate per-call heap allocation in Gaussian elimination

Rename Equation::eliminate to eliminate_into and accept an externally
owned scratch Vec<(usize, Gf256)> parameter. The caller passes a reusable
scratch buffer that is cleared and populated during the merge of self.terms
with the scaled pivot terms, then swapped into self.terms via mem::swap.

Previously, each call to eliminate() allocated a fresh Vec with
capacity(self.terms.len() + pivot.len()) which was immediately dropped
after assignment. For large block counts this produced O(n^2) allocations
during the decoding matrix reduction. The scratch buffer amortizes this
to a single allocation across the entire decode pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
